name: TDI Sharkfin Reversal
description: Restored original TradingView TDI Sharkfin strategy. Trades only the white buy/sell label signals from the uploaded Pine script. Turquoise wait crosses, TDI Bollinger-band sharkfins, and signal-line 68/32 exits are ignored.

long.name: tdi_white_buy_signal
long.rule: fastMA[2] < 32 AND fastMA[1] > fastMA[2] AND fastMA > fastMA[1] AND fastMA < 32
long.meaning: Original white BUY label: sharkfin curls upward while still below the 32 oversold band.

sell_or_reduce.name: tdi_white_sell_signal
sell_or_reduce.rule: fastMA[2] > 68 AND fastMA[1] < fastMA[2] AND fastMA < fastMA[1] AND fastMA > 68
sell_or_reduce.meaning: Original white SELL label: sharkfin curls downward while still above the 68 overbought band.

exit_logic.short_backtest_take_profit: For backtest short simulation only, exit at +1.0% move in short direction.
exit_logic.short_backtest_stop_loss: For backtest short simulation only, exit at -0.5% move against short direction.
exit_logic.spot_live_sell_rule: In live spot mode, a white SELL signal converts the selected token back to USDT only if the agent already holds that token. No spot shorting.

ignored_signals.name: bandBuySignal
ignored_signals.reason: This is a wait/position marker in the Pine script, not the white trade label.

ignored_signals.name: bandSellSignal
ignored_signals.reason: This is a wait/position marker in the Pine script, not the white trade label.

ignored_signals.name: tdi_bollinger_band_sharkfin
ignored_signals.reason: Removed. This was an added backend rule, not the original white-label strategy.

ignored_signals.name: tdi_signal_line_exit_68_or_32
ignored_signals.reason: Removed. The restored strategy exits by the original TP/SL tracking logic, not by signal-line 68/32.

trade_behavior.live_spot_sell: selected token -> USDT on tdi_white_sell_signal only if token balance exists.

risk.notes: Risk settings match the uploaded Pine script shark-fin win/loss tracking defaults: tp_perc 1.0 and sl_perc 0.5.
